other_observers: Mark Peterson and Tony Leukering, who agreed with ID;
description: Pale male redpoll: back whitish to pale sandy colored background. Somewhat limited pale pink wash on chest. Small red poll. One tiny mark on undertail coverts. Pale pink, moderate size, unmarked rump patch. Very bright and prominent white greater wingcovert bar and tertial edges. Medium sized billBehaviors: At feedersCall: heard same odd call note as with Schmoker's birdPlumage: unknown
photographer: Photographer: Steven Mlodinow, Steven Mlodinow, Steven Mlodinow
